title: COMMUNITY ROOM - 211info
text: MAYBELLE CENTER COMMUNITY ROOM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop in center for recreation and socialization, including games, parties, art classes, and more. Also provides guidance and advocacy for members to help navigate social services. 121 NW 6th Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Must be a member to access the Community Room. Members must meet the following requirements: -Currently housed in or around the Downtown Portland area -Self-identify as low-income -Age 18 and older Hours: Monday/Friday 1pm-3pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10:30am-2:30pm Email (503) 241-7374 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 241-7374 Main phone Main phone (503) 241-7374 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or fill out form on website for appointment to become a member FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97201, 97204, 97205, and 97209 Services: Drop In Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MAYBELLE CENTER
